heading: Construction
label: 4910 Construction
notes: Effective DateSection effective 1 year after , see , set out as a note under .July 29, 1998section 13 of Pub. L. 105–216section 4901 of this title

children.heading: PMI not required
children.label: a PMI not required
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to impose any requirement for private mortgage insurance in connection with a residential mortgage transaction.

children.heading: No preclusion of cancellation or termination agreements
children.label: b No preclusion of cancellation or termination agreements
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to preclude cancellation or termination, by agreement between a mortgagor and the holder of the mortgage, of a requirement for private mortgage insurance in connection with a residential mortgage transaction before the cancellation or termination date established by this chapter for the mortgage.
